strategy: Fight the three tendrils (Life ~20,270 HP, Death ~16,095, Myth ~12,465) as a team; most runs spawn the Life and Death variants.
Hit any tendril every single round. If no tendril is struck, Aphrodite pollinates the whole team with a Shadow DoT (~400 up front, then ~300/round for three rounds).
Assign roles: 1-2 Feint specialists trapping one tendril, wand-spam supports keeping a tendril hit each round, and a hammer in the fourth slot stacking the feints for the kill.
Avoid DoT spells: Life answers with Mass Triage, Myth with Shift, and Death with Deer Knight (which removes your over-time attacks). Never DoT the Death tendril.
Don't blade or drop a damage bubble opposite a Myth tendril, or the tendril across from you fires two cheats (one immediately, one at end of turn).
Round flow: wand a single untrapped tendril while trappers layer Feint on it; once it has 2-3 Feints the hammer casts a big AoE, aiming to drop multiple tendrils in the same round.
Alternative: run an all-AoE team (Meteor, Sandstorm) with an active aura and a strong healer to grind every tendril down at once.
Don't cast Deer Knight yourself, since its over-time damage just gets removed.
